## [00:00 - 02:08]

So let's look at how we import this report into your Google Analytics account. So the link for this should be below this video. So first of all, click the link and load this page up. So it should say Facebook ads, attribution and tracking Trinity campaign breakdown at the top. Just to make sure you're in the right place and my name is at the top in a few stars, which is cool. Read the description and make sure you understand that. So I'll just give you that as a guide. There's no point in me talking through it again. But just make sure that you read this because the naming convention is so important. So without the naming convention in place, this report won't work. However, once you've done all that, I'm just going to show you how to import this into your Google Analytics account. So at the top left, you have this import button. Hit that here and then it will ask you to select a view. So you need to be logged in, obviously, into the right Google Analytics view. And very mind if you're running stores for multiple clients or you've got client stores, plus you're only calling the store or your own website, you'll have to make sure you're logged in as well. So here I am logged in. I'm going to just put it into this store here because I know it doesn't have it. So I've selected the Google Analytics account and also the view that I want to plug into. This is the default name, Fat Campaign Breakdown. So that's just pre-programmed into what I've set up here for you. And then you click Create and that will push it into your Google Analytics account that's as simple as it is. That's all you have to do. It will appear on the left hand side under Custom Reports. So if there's no data appearing as it is here, because this website doesn't have any traffic and nothing's been set up, then it's either you've got no traffic or the traffic driving doesn't have the URLs, the UTM tracking set up properly, and make sure that that is the case. So the very simplest thing to do is to copy this and to paste it into the UTM tracking area within Ads Manager.
